title: rubus rivularis var. rigidatus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. rigidatus is a variant of the Rubus rivularis plant, commonly known as the River Raspberry, a species of bramble native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. rigidatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rubus rivularis var. rigidatus typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
